title: Knights of Undying - Barebones [Golden Version]
description: Adds the appearance of an entity from the Knights of the Zodiac in place of the totem of undying.
body:
![images_logo(g)bb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc002e5229729b822be1def869ec9770337ec440.png)

Are you a fan of Knights of the Zodiac and want to bring more of that universe into your Minecraft world? Try this resource pack that transforms your Totem of Undying into a totem of your favorite knight!

Simply rename the totem using an anvil, and you're all set! You're protected!

![renames](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb0b7898b2af213a7522b49007ca956d2efb4449.png)
![ingame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d1d6ac8017948ce00c3640f202951b012c33117.png)

Contact me on my discord (seiyadipessego) if you have any problem with it.
